personas.name: Operator
personas.role: Monitoring and Capacity Planning a Liminal Deployment

stories.text: As an Operator, I want to see per-channel message rates so that I can identify hot channels and plan capacity accordingly.
As an Operator, I want to see per-channel delivery latency so that I can detect degradation before it impacts consumers.
As an Operator, I want to see reject and defer rates per channel so that I can identify channels experiencing backpressure and take corrective action.
As an Operator, I want to see capacity utilization per consumer so that I can identify overloaded consumers and scale them.
As an Operator, I want to scrape metrics via a Prometheus-compatible endpoint so that I can integrate with my existing monitoring infrastructure.
As an Operator, I want to see active conversation count and error rate so that I can detect conversation failures and investigate root causes.

As an Application Developer, I want trace context propagated automatically through conversations so that I can correlate log entries across all messages in a multi-step exchange without manual instrumentation.
As an Application Developer, I want structured log entries with trace IDs so that I can search logs by conversation and reconstruct the full message flow.
As an Application Developer, I want to see conversation completion rates and durations so that I can identify performance bottlenecks in my exchange patterns.
As an Application Developer, I want durable channel queue depth visible as a metric so that I can monitor consumer lag and tune my processing capacity.
